name: Atotech Deutschland GmbH & Co. KG
h1: Atotech Deutschland's GCC footprint in India
lede: Atotech Deutschland runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering R&D, built over 36 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atotech Deutschland office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atotech Deutschland GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atotech Deutschland runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Atotech Deutschland's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nine decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Atotech Deutschland operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Atotech Deutschland's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.
